perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a black checkered top and fuzzy hat stands in front of a store named '光66寵物百貨批發倉', gesturing with high energy towards the entrance. (2) She is joined by another woman in a dark brown dress pushing a shopping cart filled with pet supplies, and they enter the store. (3) Inside, they proceed through a fast-paced montage, holding up various pet products such as 'Dogcat Star' and 'Lady Condensed' cat litter, 'Detective Meow' and 'Orijen' pet food. (4) The women interact with each other and the camera, pointing at shelves and holding promotional signs. (5) One host is seen holding a small white dog while showcasing 'HEROMama' and 'CIAO' snacks. (6) They navigate through aisles of snacks priced at 99 TWD, eventually ending the video by waving at the exit with a full cart.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately at a high volume. (2) Two female voices speak with high-pitched, excited tones, introducing the store. (3) A male narrator's voice enters with a professional yet energetic tone, shouting out specific prices and 'buy one get one free' deals. (4) Continuous sound effects such as 'dings', 'pops', and 'camera shutter' sounds coincide with text and price tags appearing on screen. (5) The soundscape remains dense with constant speech and rhythmic music throughout the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你敢信' (You won't believe it) - Surprised hook. (2) '寵物版超好買' (Pet version super easy to buy) - Enthusiastic recommendation. (3) '過年超多活動' (Many Chinese New Year activities) - Time-sensitive hook. (4) '買一送一' (Buy one get one free) - Repeated promotional text. (5) Various price points like '249', '99', '750', '666' - Functional pricing information. (6) Brand names such as '汪喵星球', 'HEROMama', '阿提拉' - Functional identification.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female hosts appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One host wears a black/white checkered sweater and a grey fuzzy hat; the second host wears a brown tiered dress and a pearl necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large pet supply warehouse/store featuring high shelves stocked with bags of cat litter, canned food, and numerous bins of pet snacks. Red promotional banners and cartoon cat/dog mascots are visible.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor studio-like lighting within a retail environment.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the Chinese New Year sales event at the '光66' pet supply warehouse. The video utilizes a fast-paced, high-energy format to showcase a wide variety of discounted pet products (food, snacks, litter) to encourage viewers to visit the physical store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of store name, address indications, specific price call-outs, and 'buy one get one free' deals.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced editing style typical of Taiwanese retail influencers, featuring constant price overlays and dual-host banter.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively targets budget-conscious pet owners by emphasizing high 'CP value' and bulk buy discounts during the festive season.
